# Code RED Decompiled Source Export
# Source: related_apps/code_red_sccl_attempt_bundle_v1/code_red_script_compile_lab_v1/src/main.c
# SHA1: 4e3bde53f93eb1e811ea8a1a91b9cc259dd862e9
# Export type: source/text copy

#include "types.h"
#include "constants.h"
#include "intrinsics.h"
#include "natives.h"

/*
    Code RED RDR Vehicle Menu Probe v1
    Goal: make a menu that is hard to miss in-game.

    This intentionally avoids the fragile FUI/GUI-window menu path for the first test.
    It uses the subtitle channel as a fallback overlay. If this text appears, the
    script loaded and the input loop is alive. Then the vehicle spawner/tune keys
    can be tested.

    Offline/single-player research target only.
*/

Layout gLayout;
Actor gVehicle;
int gPreset;
int gMaxSpeed;
int gPushSpeed;
bool gMenuVisible;
bool gReapplyTune;
bool gEngineOn;
bool gHandbrake;
int gFrame;

bool kF5;
bool k1;
bool k2;
bool k3;
bool k4;
bool k5;
bool k6;
bool k7;
bool k8;
bool k9;
bool k0;

void CR_Print(const char* text, float seconds)
{
    _CLEAR_PRINTS();
    _PRINT_SUBTITLE(text, seconds, true, 2, 1, 0, 0, 0);
}

bool CR_KeyPressedOnce(eKey key, bool* latch)
{
    bool now = _IS_KEY_PRESSED(key);
    bool fire = false;

    if (now && !*latch)
        fire = true;

    *latch = now;
    return fire;
}

Actor CR_Player()
{
    Actor player;
    player = GET_PLAYER_ACTOR(0);
    if (IS_ACTOR_VALID(player))
        return player;

    return 0;
}

bool CR_ValidActor(Actor actor)
{
    if (actor == 0)
        return false;

    return IS_ACTOR_VALID(actor);
}

void CR_EnsureLayout()
{
    if (!_IS_LAYOUT_VALID(gLayout))
        gLayout = CREATE_LAYOUT("CodeREDVehicleMenuProbe");
}

void CR_ApplyTune()
{
    if (!CR_ValidActor(gVehicle))
        return;

    if (IS_ACTOR_VEHICLE(gVehicle))
    {
        ENABLE_VEHICLE_SEAT(gVehicle, 0, true);
        SET_VEHICLE_ALLOWED_TO_DRIVE(gVehicle, true);
        SET_VEHICLE_ENGINE_RUNNING(gVehicle, gEngineOn);
        VEHICLE_SET_HANDBRAKE(gVehicle, gHandbrake);
        SET_ACTOR_MAX_SPEED(gVehicle, gMaxSpeed);
        SET_ACTOR_MAX_SPEED_ABSOLUTE(gVehicle, gMaxSpeed);
    }
}

void CR_SetPreset(int preset)
{
    gPreset = preset;

    if (preset == 0)
    {
        gMaxSpeed = 18;
        gPushSpeed = 12;
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle tune: NORMAL", 2.0f);
    }
    else if (preset == 1)
    {
        gMaxSpeed = 35;
        gPushSpeed = 28;
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle tune: FAST", 2.0f);
    }
    else if (preset == 2)
    {
        gMaxSpeed = 10;
        gPushSpeed = 7;
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle tune: HEAVY", 2.0f);
    }
    else
    {
        gMaxSpeed = 50;
        gPushSpeed = 42;
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle tune: CHAOS", 2.0f);
    }

    CR_ApplyTune();
}

Actor CR_SpawnVehicle(const char* name, eActor actorId)
{
    Actor player;
    Actor oldActor;
    Actor vehicle;
    vector3 pos;
    int i;

    CR_EnsureLayout();

    player = CR_Player();
    if (!CR_ValidActor(player))
    {
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle menu: player actor not valid yet", 2.0f);
        return 0;
    }

    GET_POSITION(player, &pos);
    pos.x = pos.x + 4.0f;

    oldActor = FIND_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT(gLayout, name);
    if (CR_ValidActor(oldActor))
        DESTROY_ACTOR(oldActor);

    STREAMING_REQUEST_ACTOR(actorId, 1, 0);
    for (i = 0; i < 20; i++)
        WAIT(0);

    vehicle = CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT(gLayout, name, actorId, pos, Vector3(0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f));

    for (i = 0; i < 120; i++)
    {
        if (CR_ValidActor(vehicle))
            break;

        WAIT(0);
    }

    if (!CR_ValidActor(vehicle))
    {
        CR_Print("Code RED vehicle menu: vehicle did not load", 3.0f);
        return 0;
    }

    gVehicle = vehicle;

    SET_ACTOR_RIDEABLE(vehicle, true);
    SET_ALLOW_RIDE_BY_PLAYER(vehicle, true);

    if (IS_ACTOR_VEHICLE(vehicle))
    {
        ENABLE_VEHICLE_SEAT(vehicle, 0, true);
        SET_VEHICLE_ALLOWED_TO_DRIVE(vehicle, true);
        SET_VEHICLE_ENGINE_RUNNING(vehicle, true);
        VEHICLE_SET_HANDBRAKE(vehicle, false);
        START_VEHICLE(vehicle);
        SET_ACTOR_IN_VEHICLE(player, vehicle, 0);
    }

    gEngineOn = true;
    gHandbrake = false;
    CR_ApplyTune();

    CR_Print("Code RED vehicle spawned and linked to live tune menu", 3.0f);
    return vehicle;
}

void CR_DrawMenu()
{
    if (!gMenuVisible)
        return;

    if ((gFrame % 45) == 0)
    {
        if (!CR_ValidActor(gVehicle))
            CR_Print("CODE RED VEH MENU | F5 hide | 1 Car | 2 Truck | 3 Normal | 4 Fast | 5 Heavy | 6 Chaos", 1.5f);
        else if (gHandbrake)
            CR_Print("CODE RED VEH MENU | 7 Brake:ON | 8 Engine | 9 Reapply | 0 Status | 6 Push", 1.5f);
        else if (!gEngineOn)
            CR_Print("CODE RED VEH MENU | 7 Brake | 8 Engine:OFF | 9 Reapply | 0 Status | 6 Push", 1.5f);
        else
            CR_Print("CODE RED VEH MENU | 7 Brake | 8 Engine:ON | 9 Reapply | 0 Status | 6 Push", 1.5f);
    }
}

void CR_Status()
{
    if (!CR_ValidActor(gVehicle))
    {
        CR_Print("Code RED status: menu alive, no vehicle yet. Press 1 or 2.", 3.0f);
        return;
    }

    if (gPreset == 0)
        CR_Print("Code RED status: vehicle valid, preset NORMAL", 3.0f);
    else if (gPreset == 1)
        CR_Print("Code RED status: vehicle valid, preset FAST", 3.0f);
    else if (gPreset == 2)
        CR_Print("Code RED status: vehicle valid, preset HEAVY", 3.0f);
    else
        CR_Print("Code RED status: vehicle valid, preset CHAOS", 3.0f);
}

void CR_HandleInput()
{
    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_F5, &kF5))
    {
        gMenuVisible = !gMenuVisible;
        if (gMenuVisible)
            CR_Print("Code RED vehicle menu visible", 2.0f);
        else
            CR_Print("Code RED vehicle menu hidden. Press F5 to show.", 2.0f);
    }

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_1, &k1))
        CR_SpawnVehicle("CodeRED_Car01", ACTOR_VEHICLE_Car01);

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_2, &k2))
        CR_SpawnVehicle("CodeRED_Truck01", ACTOR_VEHICLE_Truck01);

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_3, &k3))
        CR_SetPreset(0);

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_4, &k4))
        CR_SetPreset(1);

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_5, &k5))
        CR_SetPreset(2);

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_6, &k6))
    {
        CR_SetPreset(3);
        if (CR_ValidActor(gVehicle))
        {
            SET_ACTOR_SPEED(gVehicle, gPushSpeed);
            CR_Print("Code RED vehicle push applied", 2.0f);
        }
    }

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_7, &k7))
    {
        gHandbrake = !gHandbrake;
        CR_ApplyTune();
        if (gHandbrake)
            CR_Print("Code RED handbrake ON", 2.0f);
        else
            CR_Print("Code RED handbrake OFF", 2.0f);
    }

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_8, &k8))
    {
        gEngineOn = !gEngineOn;
        CR_ApplyTune();
        if (gEngineOn)
            CR_Print("Code RED engine ON", 2.0f);
        else
            CR_Print("Code RED engine OFF", 2.0f);
    }

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_9, &k9))
    {
        gReapplyTune = !gReapplyTune;
        if (gReapplyTune)
            CR_Print("Code RED reapply tune loop ON", 2.0f);
        else
            CR_Print("Code RED reapply tune loop OFF", 2.0f);
    }

    if (CR_KeyPressedOnce(KEY_0, &k0))
        CR_Status();
}

void main()
{
    gVehicle = 0;
    gPreset = 0;
    gMaxSpeed = 18;
    gPushSpeed = 12;
    gMenuVisible = true;
    gReapplyTune = true;
    gEngineOn = true;
    gHandbrake = false;
    gFrame = 0;

    ADD_PERSISTENT_SCRIPT(_GET_ID_OF_THIS_SCRIPT());
    CR_EnsureLayout();
    CR_Print("Code RED vehicle menu loaded. F5 toggle, 1 car, 2 truck.", 5.0f);

    while (true)
    {
        gFrame++;
        CR_HandleInput();

        if (gReapplyTune)
            CR_ApplyTune();

        CR_DrawMenu();
        WAIT(0);
    }
}
